scripts.dev: concurrently --names "frontend,proxy,backend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" "PORT=5000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/qazvelo run dev" "PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "bash -c 'cd backend && python run.py'"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
